definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="58" y="58"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_binary_ops" inline="false"><field name="OP">OR</field><value name="A"><block type="block_is_tagged_in"><value name="a"><block type="world_data_blockat"><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value></block></value><value name="b"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">ssc14:tables</field></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="logic_negate"><value name="BOOL"><block type="block_is_tagged_in"><value name="a"><block type="world_data_blockat"><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value></block></value><value name="b"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">ssc14:tables</field></block></value></block></value></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">&#10;        // Обновляем 5 блоков: центр + 4 направления&#10;        int centerX = (int) Math.floor(x);&#10;        int centerY = (int) Math.floor(y);&#10;        int centerZ = (int) Math.floor(z);&#10;&#10;        // Список координат для обновления: [x, z]&#10;        int[][] offsets = {&#10;            {0, 0},   // центр&#10;            {0, -1},  // север&#10;            {1, 0},   // восток&#10;            {0, 1},   // юг&#10;            {-1, 0}   // запад&#10;        };&#10;&#10;        for (int[] offset : offsets) {&#10;            int posX = centerX + offset[0];&#10;            int posY = centerY;&#10;            int posZ = centerZ + offset[1];&#10;&#10;            BlockPos pos = new BlockPos(posX, posY, posZ);&#10;            BlockState blockState = world.getBlockState(pos);&#10;&#10;            // Пропускаем, если это не стол&#10;            if (!blockState.is(BlockTags.create(ResourceLocation.parse("ssc14:tables")))) {&#10;                continue;&#10;            }&#10;&#10;            // Проверяем соседей ВОКРУГ этого блока (встроенная проверка тега)&#10;boolean hasNorth = world.getBlockState(BlockPos.containing(posX, posY, posZ - 1))&#10;    .is(BlockTags.create(ResourceLocation.parse("ssc14:tables")));&#10;boolean hasEast  = world.getBlockState(BlockPos.containing(posX + 1, posY, posZ))&#10;    .is(BlockTags.create(ResourceLocation.parse("ssc14:tables")));&#10;boolean hasSouth = world.getBlockState(BlockPos.containing(posX, posY, posZ + 1))&#10;    .is(BlockTags.create(ResourceLocation.parse("ssc14:tables")));&#10;boolean hasWest  = world.getBlockState(BlockPos.containing(posX - 1, posY, posZ))&#10;    .is(BlockTags.create(ResourceLocation.parse("ssc14:tables")));&#10;&#10;            // Маппинг по твоей таблице&#10;            int[] mapping = {0, 1, 2, 5, 3, 9, 6, 12, 4, 8, 10, 13, 7, 11, 14, 15};&#10;            int mask = (hasNorth ? 1 : 0) | (hasEast ? 2 : 0) | (hasSouth ? 4 : 0) | (hasWest ? 8 : 0);&#10;            int connectionValue = mapping[mask];&#10;&#10;            // Устанавливаем состояние БЕЗ триггера соседей&#10;            IntegerProperty property = (IntegerProperty) blockState.getBlock().getStateDefinition().getProperty("blockstate");&#10;            if (property != null && property.getPossibleValues().contains(connectionValue)) {&#10;                world.setBlock(pos, blockState.setValue(property, connectionValue), 2); // Флаг 2 = без updateNeighbors&#10;            }&#10;        }&#10;</field></block></statement></block></next></block><block type="world_send_chat" x="83" y="1407"><field name="color">#000000</field><field name="bold">TRUE</field><field name="italic">FALSE</field><field name="underlined">FALSE</field><value name="text"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">=====</field></block></value><next><block type="world_send_chat"><field name="color">#99ff99</field><field name="bold">FALSE</field><field name="italic">TRUE</field><field name="underlined">FALSE</field><value name="text"><block type="text_join"><mutation items="8"></mutation><value name="ADD0"><block type="time_to_formatted_string"><value name="format"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">mm-ss-SSS</field></block></value></block></value><value name="ADD1"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT"> || </field></block></value><value name="ADD2"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="ADD3"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">  </field></block></value><value name="ADD4"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="ADD5"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT">  </field></block></value><value name="ADD6"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="ADD7"><block type="text"><field name="TEXT"> || Обновление!</field></block></value></block></value></block></next></block></xml>
